computerReply: Unoccupied sections are being closed down in order to clear space in the main computer banks. It is necessary to facilitate the system upgrade. Full power can be restored if needed.

userQuery: There's a power reduction in section L-Ninety Four. Explain.

userQuery: Kansas City. No, wait. New Orleans. Bourbon Street Bar, New Orleans. Around two a.m.
